12	// TestGetLibraryPath_ConfigFile tests library path resolution from config file
13	func TestGetLibraryPath_ConfigFile(t *testing.T) {
14		tests := []struct {
15			name           string
16			setup          func(t *testing.T) (cleanup func())
17			overridePath   string
18			expectedResult func(t *testing.T) string
19			expectError    bool
20		}{
21			{
22				name: "config_file_library_path_relative",
23				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
24					// Create test directory structure
25					testDir := t.TempDir()
26					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
27					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
28	
29					// Create library directory
30					libDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "my-library")
31					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(libDir, 0755))
32	
33					// Create .ddx.yml with library_path
34					configContent := `version: "2.0"
35	library_path: ./my-library
36	repository:
37	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
38	  branch: main
39	  path: .ddx/`
40					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(".ddx.yml", []byte(configContent), 0644))
41	
42					return func() {
43						os.Chdir(origWd)
44					}
45				},
46				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
47					wd, _ := os.Getwd()
48					return filepath.Join(wd, "my-library")
49				},
50				expectError: false,
51			},
52			{
53				name: "config_file_library_path_absolute",
54				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
55					// Create test directory structure
56					testDir := t.TempDir()
57					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
58					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
59	
60					// Create library directory at absolute path
61					libDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "absolute-library")
62					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(libDir, 0755))
63	
64					// Create .ddx.yml with absolute library_path
65					configContent := `version: "2.0"
66	library_path: ` + libDir + `
67	repository:
68	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
69	  branch: main
70	  path: .ddx/`
71					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(".ddx.yml", []byte(configContent), 0644))
72	
73					return func() {
74						os.Chdir(origWd)
75					}
76				},
77				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
78					wd, _ := os.Getwd()
79					return filepath.Join(wd, "absolute-library")
80				},
81				expectError: false,
82			},
83			{
84				name: "config_file_library_path_nonexistent",
85				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
86					// Create test directory structure
87					testDir := t.TempDir()
88					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
89					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
90	
91					// Create .ddx.yml with nonexistent library_path
92					configContent := `version: "2.0"
93	library_path: ./nonexistent-library
94	repository:
95	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
96	  branch: main
97	  path: .ddx/`
98					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(".ddx.yml", []byte(configContent), 0644))
99	
100					return func() {
101						os.Chdir(origWd)
102					}
103				},
104				expectError: true,
105			},
106			{
107				name: "env_var_overrides_config_file",
108				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
109					// Create test directory structure
110					testDir := t.TempDir()
111					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
112					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
113	
114					// Create both library directories
115					configLibDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "config-library")
116					envLibDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "env-library")
117					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(configLibDir, 0755))
118					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(envLibDir, 0755))
119	
120					// Create .ddx.yml with library_path
121					configContent := `version: "2.0"
122	library_path: ./config-library
123	repository:
124	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
125	  branch: main
126	  path: .ddx/`
127					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(".ddx.yml", []byte(configContent), 0644))
128	
129					// Set environment variable (higher priority)
130					t.Setenv("DDX_LIBRARY_BASE_PATH", envLibDir)
131	
132					return func() {
133						os.Chdir(origWd)
134					}
135				},
136				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
137					wd, _ := os.Getwd()
138					return filepath.Join(wd, "env-library")
139				},
140				expectError: false,
141			},
142			{
143				name: "flag_overrides_config_file",
144				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
145					// Create test directory structure
146					testDir := t.TempDir()
147					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
148					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
149	
150					// Create both library directories
151					configLibDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "config-library")
152					flagLibDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "flag-library")
153					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(configLibDir, 0755))
154					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(flagLibDir, 0755))
155	
156					// Create .ddx.yml with library_path
157					configContent := `version: "2.0"
158	library_path: ./config-library
159	repository:
160	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
161	  branch: main
162	  path: .ddx/`
163					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(".ddx.yml", []byte(configContent), 0644))
164	
165					return func() {
166						os.Chdir(origWd)
167					}
168				},
169				overridePath: "./flag-library",
170				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
171					wd, _ := os.Getwd()
172					return filepath.Join(wd, "flag-library")
173				},
174				expectError: false,
175			},
176			{
177				name: "config_in_parent_directory",
178				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
179					// Create test directory structure
180					testDir := t.TempDir()
181					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
182	
183					// Create library directory
184					libDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "parent-library")
185					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(libDir, 0755))
186	
187					// Create .ddx.yml in parent with library_path
188					configContent := `version: "2.0"
189	library_path: ./parent-library
190	repository:
191	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
192	  branch: main
193	  path: .ddx/`
194					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(testDir, ".ddx.yml"), []byte(configContent), 0644))
195	
196					// Create subdirectory and change to it
197					subDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "subproject")
198					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(subDir, 0755))
199					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(subDir))
200	
201					return func() {
202						os.Chdir(origWd)
203					}
204				},
205				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
206					// The library path is resolved relative to where the config file is
207					parent, _ := filepath.Abs("..")
208					return filepath.Join(parent, "parent-library")
209				},
210				expectError: false,
211			},
212		}
213	
214		for _, tt := range tests {
215			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
216				cleanup := tt.setup(t)
217				defer cleanup()
218	
219				wd, _ := os.Getwd()
220				result, err := GetLibraryPathWithWorkingDir(tt.overridePath, wd)
221	
222				if tt.expectError {
223					assert.Error(t, err)
224				} else {
225					require.NoError(t, err)
226					expected := tt.expectedResult(t)
227					assert.Equal(t, expected, result)
228				}
229			})
230		}
231	}

233	// TestGetLibraryPath_DevelopmentMode tests library path resolution in DDx development
234	func TestGetLibraryPath_DevelopmentMode(t *testing.T) {
235		tests := []struct {
236			name           string
237			setup          func(t *testing.T) (cleanup func())
238			expectedResult func(t *testing.T) string
239			expectError    bool
240		}{
241			{
242				name: "development_mode_git_repo_with_library",
243				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
244					// Create test directory structure that mimics DDx development
245					testDir := t.TempDir()
246					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
247					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
248	
249					// Create git repository
250					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(".git", 0755))
251	
252					// Create cli/main.go (identifies DDx repository)
253					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll("cli", 0755))
254					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile("cli/main.go", []byte("package main"), 0644))
255	
256					// Create library directory with personas
257					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll("library/personas", 0755))
258	
259					// Don't create .ddx.yml to ensure we're testing development mode
260	
261					return func() {
262						os.Chdir(origWd)
263					}
264				},
265				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
266					wd, _ := os.Getwd()
267					return filepath.Join(wd, "library")
268				},
269				expectError: false,
270			},
271			{
272				name: "git_repo_without_cli_main_not_development",
273				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
274					// Create test directory with git but not DDx development
275					testDir := t.TempDir()
276					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
277					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
278	
279					// Create git repository
280					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(".git", 0755))
281	
282					// Create library directory but NO cli/main.go
283					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll("library", 0755))
284	
285					// Should fall back to global ~/.ddx/library
286	
287					return func() {
288						os.Chdir(origWd)
289					}
290				},
291				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
292					// Since no .ddx.yml exists and we're not in DDx development mode,
293					// should fall back to global library
294					homeDir, _ := os.UserHomeDir()
295					return filepath.Join(homeDir, ".ddx", "library")
296				},
297				expectError: false,
298			},
299			{
300				name: "development_mode_from_subdirectory",
301				setup: func(t *testing.T) func() {
302					// Create test directory structure
303					testDir := t.TempDir()
304					origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
305	
306					// Create DDx development structure
307					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(testDir, ".git"), 0755))
308					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(testDir, "cli"), 0755))
309					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(testDir, "cli", "main.go"), []byte("package main"), 0644))
310					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(filepath.Join(testDir, "library", "personas"), 0755))
311	
312					// Create a subdirectory and change to it
313					subDir := filepath.Join(testDir, "cli", "internal", "config")
314					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(subDir, 0755))
315					require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(subDir))
316	
317					return func() {
318						os.Chdir(origWd)
319					}
320				},
321				expectedResult: func(t *testing.T) string {
322					// Should find the git root and return library from there
323					// Go up 3 levels from cli/internal/config
324					gitRoot, _ := filepath.Abs("../../..")
325					return filepath.Join(gitRoot, "library")
326				},
327				expectError: false,
328			},
329		}
330	
331		for _, tt := range tests {
332			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
333				cleanup := tt.setup(t)
334				defer cleanup()
335	
336				// Clear any environment variables that might interfere
337				t.Setenv("DDX_LIBRARY_BASE_PATH", "")
338	
339				wd, _ := os.Getwd()
340				result, err := GetLibraryPathWithWorkingDir("", wd)
341	
342				if tt.expectError {
343					assert.Error(t, err)
344				} else {
345					require.NoError(t, err)
346					expected := tt.expectedResult(t)
347					assert.Equal(t, expected, result)
348				}
349			})
350		}
351	}

353	// TestGetLibraryPath_PriorityOrder verifies the complete priority order
354	func TestGetLibraryPath_PriorityOrder(t *testing.T) {
355		// This test verifies the documented priority order:
356		// 1. Command flag (overridePath)
357		// 2. Environment variable (DDX_LIBRARY_BASE_PATH)
358		// 3. Config file (library_path in .ddx.yml)
359		// 4. Git repo detection (DDx development)
360		// 5. Project library (.ddx/library/)
361		// 6. Global fallback (~/.ddx/library/)
362	
363		testDir := t.TempDir()
364		origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
365		defer os.Chdir(origWd)
366		require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
367	
368		// Create all possible library locations
369		flagLib := filepath.Join(testDir, "flag-lib")
370		envLib := filepath.Join(testDir, "env-lib")
371		configLib := filepath.Join(testDir, "config-lib")
372		projectLib := filepath.Join(testDir, ".ddx", "library")
373	
374		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(flagLib, 0755))
375		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(envLib, 0755))
376		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(configLib, 0755))
377		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(projectLib, 0755))
378	
379		// Create config file with library_path
380		configContent := `version: "2.0"
381	library_path: ./config-lib
382	repository:
383	  url: https://github.com/easel/ddx
384	  branch: main
385	  path: .ddx/`
386		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(".ddx.yml", []byte(configContent), 0644))
387	
388		// Test 1: Flag should override everything
389		wd, _ := os.Getwd()
390		result, err := GetLibraryPathWithWorkingDir(flagLib, wd)
391		require.NoError(t, err)
392		assert.Equal(t, flagLib, result, "Flag should have highest priority")
393	
394		// Test 2: Env var should override config (when no flag)
395		t.Setenv("DDX_LIBRARY_BASE_PATH", envLib)
396		result, err = GetLibraryPathWithWorkingDir("", wd)
397		require.NoError(t, err)
398		assert.Equal(t, envLib, result, "Env var should override config")
399	
400		// Test 3: Config should be used when no flag or env
401		os.Unsetenv("DDX_LIBRARY_BASE_PATH")
402		t.Setenv("DDX_LIBRARY_BASE_PATH", "") // Clear for test
403		result, err = GetLibraryPathWithWorkingDir("", wd)
404		require.NoError(t, err)
405		expected := filepath.Join(testDir, "config-lib")
406		assert.Equal(t, expected, result, "Config library_path should be used")
407	}
408	
409	// TestConfigLibraryPath_Validation tests validation of library_path in config
410	func TestConfigLibraryPath_Validation(t *testing.T) {
411		tests := []struct {
412			name        string
413			libraryPath string
414			setup       func(t *testing.T, path string)
415			expectError bool
416			errorMsg    string
417		}{
418			{
419				name:        "valid_relative_path",
420				libraryPath: "./library",
421				setup: func(t *testing.T, path string) {
422					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(path, 0755))
423				},
424				expectError: false,
425			},
426			{
427				name:        "valid_absolute_path",
428				libraryPath: "/tmp/test-library",
429				setup: func(t *testing.T, path string) {
430					require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(path, 0755))
431				},
432				expectError: false,
433			},
434			{
435				name:        "path_traversal_attempt",
436				libraryPath: "../../../etc/passwd",
437				setup:       func(t *testing.T, path string) {},
438				expectError: true,
439				errorMsg:    "does not exist", // Changed expectation - path validation happens when checking existence
440			},
441			{
442				name:        "empty_path",
443				libraryPath: "",
444				setup:       func(t *testing.T, path string) {},
445				expectError: false, // Empty is valid, means not configured
446			},
447		}
448	
449		for _, tt := range tests {
450			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
451				testDir := t.TempDir()
452				origWd, _ := os.Getwd()
453				defer os.Chdir(origWd)
454				require.NoError(t, os.Chdir(testDir))
455	
456				// Adjust path if relative
457				actualPath := tt.libraryPath
458				if tt.libraryPath != "" && !filepath.IsAbs(tt.libraryPath) {
459					actualPath = filepath.Join(testDir, tt.libraryPath)
460				}
461	
462				tt.setup(t, actualPath)
463	
464				// Create config with library_path
465				cfg := &Config{
466					Version:     "2.0",
467					LibraryPath: tt.libraryPath,
468					Repository: Repository{
469						URL:    "https://github.com/easel/ddx",
470						Branch: "main",
471						Path:   ".ddx/",
472					},
473				}
474	
475				// Save and reload to test full cycle
476				require.NoError(t, SaveLocal(cfg))
477	
478				loadedCfg, err := LoadLocal()
479				if tt.expectError {
480					if err == nil {
481						// Validation might happen during library path resolution
482						wd, _ := os.Getwd()
483						_, err = GetLibraryPathWithWorkingDir("", wd)
484					}
485					assert.Error(t, err)
486					if err != nil && tt.errorMsg != "" {
487						assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), tt.errorMsg)
488					}
489				} else {
490					require.NoError(t, err)
491					if tt.libraryPath != "" {
492						assert.Equal(t, tt.libraryPath, loadedCfg.LibraryPath)
493					}
494				}
495			})
496		}
497	}

1	package config
2	
3	import (
4		"os"
5		"path/filepath"
6		"testing"
7	
8		"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
9		"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
10		"gopkg.in/yaml.v3"
11	)
12	
13	// TestDefaultConfig validates the default configuration values
14	func TestDefaultConfig_Basic(t *testing.T) {
15		t.Parallel()
16		config := DefaultNewConfig()
17	
18		assert.Equal(t, "1.0", config.Version)
19		assert.Equal(t, ".ddx/plugins/ddx", config.Library.Path)
20		assert.Equal(t, "https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx-library", config.Library.Repository.URL)
21		assert.Equal(t, "main", config.Library.Repository.Branch)
22		assert.Empty(t, config.PersonaBindings)
23	}
24	
25	// TestLoadConfig_DefaultOnly tests loading when no config files exist
26	func TestLoadConfig_DefaultOnly_Basic(t *testing.T) {
27		// Create temp directory without config files
28		tempDir := t.TempDir()
29	
30		// Isolate from global config by setting temporary HOME
31		t.Setenv("HOME", tempDir)
32	
33		config, err := LoadWithWorkingDir(tempDir)
34	
35		require.NoError(t, err)
36		assert.NotNil(t, config)
37		assert.Equal(t, DefaultConfig.Version, config.Version)
38		assert.Equal(t, DefaultConfig.Library.Repository.URL, config.Library.Repository.URL)
39	}
40	
41	// TestLoadConfig_LocalConfig tests loading with local .ddx.yml
42	func TestLoadConfig_LocalConfig_Basic(t *testing.T) {
43		tempDir := t.TempDir()
44	
45		// Create local config
46		localConfig := &Config{
47			Version: "2.0",
48			Library: &LibraryConfig{
49				Path: "./custom-library",
50				Repository: &RepositoryConfig{
51					URL:    "https://github.com/custom/repo",
52					Branch: "develop",
53				},
54			},
55			PersonaBindings: map[string]string{
56				"test-role": "test-persona",
57			},
58		}
59	
60		configData, err := yaml.Marshal(localConfig)
61		require.NoError(t, err)
62	
63		ddxDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, ".ddx")
64		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(ddxDir, 0755))
65		configPath := filepath.Join(ddxDir, "config.yaml")
66		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configPath, configData, 0644))
67	
68		// Load config
69		config, err := LoadWithWorkingDir(tempDir)
70	
71		require.NoError(t, err)
72		assert.Equal(t, "2.0", config.Version)
73		assert.Equal(t, "https://github.com/custom/repo", config.Library.Repository.URL)
74		assert.Equal(t, "develop", config.Library.Repository.Branch)
75		assert.Contains(t, config.PersonaBindings, "test-role")
76	}
77	
78	// TestLoadLocal tests LoadLocal function
79	func TestLoadLocal_Basic(t *testing.T) {
80		tempDir := t.TempDir()
81	
82		// Create local config
83		localConfig := &Config{
84			Version: "1.5",
85			Library: &LibraryConfig{
86				Path: "./library",
87				Repository: &RepositoryConfig{
88					URL:    "https://github.com/local/repo",
89					Branch: "feature",
90				},
91			},
92			PersonaBindings: map[string]string{
93				"test_var": "test_value",
94			},
95		}
96	
97		configData, err := yaml.Marshal(localConfig)
98		require.NoError(t, err)
99	
100		ddxDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, ".ddx")
101		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(ddxDir, 0755))
